tasks.subject: Task 1: SetNX KV primitive
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Atomic set-if-absent on kv.Store + both backends + concurrency tests.

**Files:** pkg/kv/store.go, memory.go (mutex), redis.go (native), memory_test.go

**Verify:** go test ./pkg/kv/...

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/kv/store.go","pkg/kv/memory.go","pkg/kv/redis.go","pkg/kv/memory_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/kv/... && go build ./... && go vet ./...","acceptanceCriteria":["SetNX on interface+both backends","true iff set; expired=absent","ttl<=0 errors","100-concurrent exactly one true"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Refresh-token rotation idempotency
tasks.description:
**Goal:** SetNX rotation lock + previous-token idempotency window; benign replay re-mints + returns existing current token; no victim lockout.

**Files:** pkg/protocol/oidc/refresh.go, refresh_test.go

**Verify:** go test ./pkg/protocol/oidc/...

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/oidc/refresh.go","pkg/protocol/oidc/refresh_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/protocol/oidc/... && go build ./...","acceptanceCriteria":["concurrent: one rotates, other retryable no revoke","replay within window same successor no second mint","after window family revoked","SetNX error safe","idempotent replay audited"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: SAML AuthnRequest replay via SetNX
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Atomic, SP-scoped, fail-closed replay check.

**Files:** pkg/protocol/saml/authnreq.go, sso.go, *_test.go

**Verify:** go test ./pkg/protocol/saml/...

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/saml/authnreq.go","pkg/protocol/saml/sso.go","pkg/protocol/saml/authnreq_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/protocol/saml/... && go build ./...","acceptanceCriteria":["key scoped by sp+id","first nil second ErrReplayedRequest","same id diff SP nil","KV error fail closed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Revoke transaction + lockout guard
tasks.description:
**Goal:** CountUsableSignInFederation query; tighten AvailableMethods; guard ErrWouldRemoveLastFactor + tx + account-row lock.

**Files:** db/queries/account_identity.sql (+sqlc), pkg/authn/flow.go, errors.go, pkg/server/handle_me_revoke_pwd_totp.go, pkg/authn/flow_test.go

**Verify:** go test ./pkg/authn/... ./pkg/server/...

```json:metadata
{"files":["db/queries/account_identity.sql","pkg/db","pkg/authn/flow.go","pkg/authn/errors.go","pkg/server/handle_me_revoke_pwd_totp.go","pkg/authn/flow_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/authn/... ./pkg/server/... && go build ./... && go vet ./...","acceptanceCriteria":["CountUsableSignInFederation excludes disabled upstream","AvailableMethods uses it","guard ErrWouldRemoveLastFactor no deletes","deletes in tx + FOR UPDATE prod path","existing no-pool unit tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Serialize passkey-delete on account row
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wrap handleDeleteMyCredential count+delete in a tx that first locks the account row; preserve last-passkey guard.

**Files:** pkg/server/handle_me.go

**Verify:** go test ./pkg/server/... + smoke

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/server/handle_me.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/server/... && go build ./...","acceptanceCriteria":["count+delete under one tx with FOR UPDATE","last-passkey guard preserved","behavior otherwise unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Close OIDC client-id timing oracle
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Dummy argon2id verify (matching params) on unknown-client+secret; uniform invalid_client; no argon2 when no secret.

**Files:** pkg/protocol/oidc/client.go (+ Provider ctor), client_test.go

**Verify:** go test ./pkg/protocol/oidc/...

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/oidc/client.go","pkg/protocol/oidc/client_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/protocol/oidc/... && go build ./...","acceptanceCriteria":["dummy verify on unknown-client+secret","no argon2 when no secret","identical invalid_client both paths","dummy PHC same params"]}
```
